reply:
[[BLOCK:srt_110]]
Speaker 2: That’s why we maintain close connections with our alumni and invite them to return as mentors or coaches, sharing their knowledge and professional experience with current students to further enrich and enhance the online learning experience.

[[BLOCK:srt_111]]
Speaker 2: All right.

[[BLOCK:srt_112]]
Speaker 3: Let’s move on.

[[BLOCK:srt_113]]
Speaker 2: Just look at me.

[[BLOCK:srt_114]]
Speaker 3: That’s better.

[[BLOCK:srt_115]]
Speaker 3: Could you explain how the university selects and assigns faculty for these programs?

[[BLOCK:srt_116]]
Speaker 3: What kind of professors will Chinese students be learning from?

[[BLOCK:srt_117]]
Speaker 1: We start by identifying leaders in their respective fields—in other words, we look for instructors who are actively working on the front lines of the industries they teach.

[[BLOCK:srt_118]]
Speaker 1: We recruit accomplished professionals who have built distinguished careers, remain at the forefront of their fields, and can bring real-world experience into the classroom to share with students.

[[BLOCK:srt_119]]
Speaker 1: At the same time, we invite professors from the world’s top universities to join Golden Gate University and contribute to our programs.

[[BLOCK:srt_120]]
Speaker 1: In short, we strive to bring together the very best—outstanding practitioners who have excelled in their fields, along with leading scholars and professors from top institutions around the world and in China.

[[BLOCK:srt_121]]
Speaker 3: So how does Golden Gate University ensure that its curriculum is designed to meet this goal?
